title: Jockey by TwelveLabs: The Video Intelligence Agent
excerpt: The TwelveLabs agent that organizes, searches, and assembles across your entire video library. Built on Pegasus and Marengo. Now in research preview.
content_html:
Integration

Ask your library from the chat you already use.

Connect your photo and video library, then ask for a person, place, scene, or moment directly inside Claude. No new interface to learn. ChatGPT coming soon.

API & SDK

Bring Jockey into your own product.

Get an API keySDK Reference

In production

Teams are already querying their video.

Marketers, creators, and builders running libraries through Jockey from ad tagging to streamlined creative workflows.

Pricing

Start free. Scale as you go

Pick a tier by how much media you store. Every plan runs the full Marengo + Pegasus engine.

Free

Get started and explore the basics

$0/ mo

  • 5GB knowledge store
  • Basic rate limits

Plus

More room and higher limits for steady projects

$20/ mo

Monthly−17%

  • 100GB knowledge store
  • Higher rate limits

Pro

Recommended

Maximum headroom for heavy, large-scale work

$100/ mo

Monthly−17%

  • 500GB knowledge store
  • Highest rate limits

Plans renew automatically. Cancel anytime — you keep access until the end of your billing cycle.

FAQ

Common questions

Yes. When you delete your library or account, we permanently remove your original files, the generated index, associated metadata, and your usage history. You can manage deletions directly from your account settings.

Jockey supports standard video (MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM) and photo (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, HEIF, WebP, BMP, GIF) formats. Please refer to the documentation for specific storage and per-file size limits.

Jockey uses multimodal AI, analyzing visual, motion, and contextual cues, to group people across your library, rather than relying on traditional facial recognition. We do not build biometric databases, compare your data against external records, or share identity information between accounts.

blocks.html_en: Ask your library from the chat you already use.

sentences.en: Ask your library from the chat you already use.
sentences.zh: 通过您已经使用的聊天室询问您的图书馆。

blocks.html_en: Connect your photo and video library, then ask for a person, place, scene, or moment directly inside Claude. No new interface to learn. ChatGPT coming soon.

sentences.en: Connect your photo and video library, then ask for a person, place, scene, or moment directly inside Claude.
sentences.zh: 连接您的照片和视频库，然后直接询问克劳德体内的人物、地点、场景或时刻。
没有新的界面可供学习。

sentences.en: Bring Jockey into your own product.
sentences.zh: 将 Jockey 引入您自己的产品中。

blocks.html_en: Get an API keySDK Reference

sentences.zh: 获取 API 密钥SDK 参考

sentences.en: Teams are already querying their video.
sentences.zh: 团队已经在查询他们的视频。

blocks.html_en: Marketers, creators, and builders running libraries through Jockey from ad tagging to streamlined creative workflows.

sentences.en: Marketers, creators, and builders running libraries through Jockey from ad tagging to streamlined creative workflows.
sentences.zh: 营销人员、创作者和构建者通过 Jockey 运行库，从广告标记到简化的创意工作流程。

blocks.html_en: Jockey moves us from ‘AI writes a description a human has to read’ to ‘AI emits structured data we can query.’ That’s the jump we needed.

sentences.en: Jockey moves us from ‘AI writes a description a human has to read’ to ‘AI emits structured data we can query.’
sentences.zh: Jockey 将我们从“人工智能编写人类必须阅读的描述”转变为“人工智能发出我们可以查询的结构化数据”。
这就是我们需要的跳跃。
Jannek Zechner 首席技术官 · 人类

blocks.html_en: It finds the exact moment I need across hours of footage in seconds. It has genuinely tightened my edits and saved me real time in post.

sentences.en: It finds the exact moment I need across hours of footage in seconds.
sentences.zh: 它可以在几秒钟内找到我需要的几个小时的镜头中的确切时刻。

sentences.en: It has genuinely tightened my edits and saved me real time in post.
sentences.zh: 它确实加强了我的编辑并节省了我在后期的实时时间。
Kyle Chalmers 内容创作者 · KC Labs

blocks.html_en: Jockey understands what happens inside a video, not just the labels on a segment. For sports analytics, that gap is the whole product.

sentences.en: Jockey understands what happens inside a video, not just the labels on a segment.
sentences.zh: Jockey 了解视频内部发生的情况，而不仅仅是片段上的标签。

sentences.en: For sports analytics, that gap is the whole product.
sentences.zh: 对于体育分析来说，这个差距就是整个产品。

sentences.en: Every plan runs the full Marengo + Pegasus engine.
sentences.zh: 每个计划都运行完整的 Marengo + Pegasus 引擎。

blocks.html_en: Yes. When you delete your library or account, we permanently remove your original files, the generated index, associated metadata, and your usage history. You can manage deletions directly from your account settings.

sentences.en: When you delete your library or account, we permanently remove your original files, the generated index, associated metadata, and your usage history.
sentences.zh: 当您删除您的图书馆或帐户时，我们将永久删除您的原始文件、生成的索引、关联的元数据和您的使用历史记录。

sentences.en: You can manage deletions directly from your account settings.
sentences.zh: 您可以直接从帐户设置管理删除。

blocks.html_en: Jockey supports standard video (MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM) and photo (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, HEIF, WebP, BMP, GIF) formats. Please refer to the documentation for specific storage and per-file size limits.

sentences.en: Jockey supports standard video (MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM) and photo (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, HEIF, WebP, BMP, GIF) formats.
sentences.zh: Jockey 支持标准视频（MP4、MOV、AVI、MKV、WebM）和照片（JPEG、PNG、HEIC、HEIF、WebP、BMP、GIF）格式。

sentences.en: Please refer to the documentation for specific storage and per-file size limits.
sentences.zh: 请参阅文档了解具体存储和每个文件的大小限制。

blocks.html_en: Jockey uses multimodal AI, analyzing visual, motion, and contextual cues, to group people across your library, rather than relying on traditional facial recognition. We do not build biometric databases, compare your data against external records, or share identity information between accounts.

sentences.en: Jockey uses multimodal AI, analyzing visual, motion, and contextual cues, to group people across your library, rather than relying on traditional facial recognition.
sentences.zh: Jockey 使用多模式人工智能，分析视觉、运动和上下文线索，对图书馆中的人员进行分组，而不是依赖传统的面部识别。

sentences.en: We do not build biometric databases, compare your data against external records, or share identity information between accounts.
sentences.zh: 我们不会构建生物识别数据库、将您的数据与外部记录进行比较，或在帐户之间共享身份信息。

content_html_zh:
一体化

通过您已经使用的聊天室询问您的图书馆。

连接您的照片和视频库，然后直接询问克劳德体内的人物、地点、场景或时刻。 没有新的界面可供学习。 ChatGPT 即将推出。

API 和 SDK

将 Jockey 引入您自己的产品中。

获取 API 密钥SDK 参考

生产中

团队已经在查询他们的视频。

营销人员、创作者和构建者通过 Jockey 运行库，从广告标记到简化的创意工作流程。

定价

开始免费。 随心扩展

根据您存储的媒体数量选择一个级别。 每个计划都运行完整的 Marengo + Pegasus 引擎。

Free

开始并探索基础知识

$0/ mo

  • 5GB知识库
  • 基本费率限制

Plus

稳定项目有更多空间和更高限制

$20/ mo

每月−17%

  • 100GB知识库
  • 更高的速率限制

Pro

受到推崇的

为繁重、大规模的工作提供最大的净空空间

$100/ mo

每月−17%

  • 500GB知识库
  • 最高速率限制

计划自动更新。 随时取消 - 您可以保留访问权限，直到计费周期结束。

FAQ

常见问题

是的。 当您删除您的图书馆或帐户时，我们将永久删除您的原始文件、生成的索引、关联的元数据和您的使用历史记录。 您可以直接从帐户设置管理删除。

Jockey 支持标准视频（MP4、MOV、AVI、MKV、WebM）和照片（JPEG、PNG、HEIC、HEIF、WebP、BMP、GIF）格式。 请参阅文档了解具体存储和每个文件的大小限制。

Jockey 使用多模式人工智能，分析视觉、运动和上下文线索，对图书馆中的人员进行分组，而不是依赖传统的面部识别。 我们不会构建生物识别数据库、将您的数据与外部记录进行比较，或在帐户之间共享身份信息。
